name: 7-gram N-gram Cache + XSA-All + LeakyReLU² + Parallel Muon
blurb: Eval-time 7-gram n-gram cache with near-zero backoff beta and fixed 80/20 cache/neural blending, delivering -0.2234 bpb over merged SOTA. No TTT, no online mixer -- a single-pass streaming cache does all the work. Built on PR #549 stack (LeakyReLU², XSA-all, Parallel Muon). 3-seed mean: 0.8960 (std 0.0004). All artifacts under 16MB, all eval under 3 min.
author: armantsaturian
